description: The City of Oakwood needs its 2024 Consumer Confidence Report (CCR) formatted for accessibility (Section 508 compliance). Create the report in Apache OpenOffice Writer using the content provided in '/home/ga/Documents/water_data.json' and the chart image at '/home/ga/Documents/ph_levels_chart.png'. Apply 'Heading 1' style to the main title and 'Heading 2' style to section titles. Insert the 'ph_levels_chart.png' image into the 'Test Results' section with the Alternative Text (Description) set to "Annual pH levels showing stability between 7.2 and 7.4". Include the Contaminant Data table from the JSON file, ensuring the first row is configured as a repeating header row. Set the document title property to "2024 Water Quality Report" and save the file as '/home/ga/Documents/Oakwood_CCR_2024.odt'.

metadata.expected_alt_text: Annual pH levels showing stability between 7.2 and 7.4
